name: product-understanding-rule-engine
purpose: Validate DeepSeek Product Understanding output before it can influence Dianxiaomi edit-page category or attributes.

rules.description: DeepSeek output must be a single strict JSON object matching product-understanding-v1.
DeepSeek must not output publish, review and publish, ready to publish, 发布, 上架, 刊登, or one-click publish advice.
DeepSeek output cannot be used for edit-page category or attributes unless local Rule Engine validation passes.
Recommended category confidence must be at least 0.72 before edit-page use.
Recommended category is only a search/mapping suggestion. Dianxiaomi visible selectable category and project rules remain the source of truth.

Category validation must check the full Dianxiaomi path, not only the English leaf name. Clothing/underwear storage paths are blocked unless product evidence clearly shows clothing, underwear, socks, wardrobe, or closet use.

A single successful collection/claim/edit chain sample cannot prove category or attribute correctness. Same-category validation must use multiple differentiated products and compare full category path plus required attributes.
Every attribute must include source and confidence. Low-confidence attributes cannot be written to edit page automatically.
Material must be inferred from Amazon title/detail evidence or a project-safe fallback before edit-page use; it must not remain blank on the edit page when the category requires it.
For the current Amazon US to AliExpress local project flow, SKU variation Ships From defaults to United States and must be present before save.
Any blocker risk blocks edit-page use until resolved by project rules or manual confirmation.
